mapper.delete:
delete from dish where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(id) from dish where category_id = #{categoryId}

select t1.*, t2.name categoryName from dish t1, category t2 where t1.category_id = t2.id
and t1.name like concat ('%', #{name}, '%')
and t1.status like concat ('%', #{status}, '%')
and category_id like concat ('%', #{categoryId}, '%')
order by update_time desc
select d.* from dish d left join setmeal_dish sd on d.id = sd.dish_id where setmeal_id = #{setmealId}
